ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "ac_rate" TEXT /* Accumulation/distribution rate */,
  "cm4" INTEGER /* Custom metric 4 */,
  "cm4up" INTEGER /* Custom metric 4 - upward */,
  "cm4down" INTEGER /* Custom metric 4 - downward */,
  "cm4normal" INTEGER /* Custom metric 4 - normal */,
  "cm5" INTEGER /* Custom metric 5 */,
  "cm5up" INTEGER /* Custom metric 5 - upward */,
  "cm5down" INTEGER /* Custom metric 5 - downward */,
  "cm5normal" INTEGER /* Custom metric 5 - normal */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "market_hours" TEXT /* Market hours of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, institutional trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, technical indicator) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert trigger event */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "market_data" TEXT /* Market data at the time of trigger */,
  "trigger_status" TEXT /* Status of the trigger (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "trigger_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the trigger event */,
  "trigger_action" TEXT /* Action taken when the alert is triggered (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_triggers_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom metric (e.g., cm4, cm5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric and how it is calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "metric_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., proprietary, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metric value is recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric for the given date */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric value (e.g., calculated, provided) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric value (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES custom_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_recognition" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recognized pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of the pattern (e.g., technical, chart) */,
  "pattern_source" TEXT /* Source of the pattern (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  "pattern_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the pattern recognition */,
  "pattern_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the pattern recognition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_recognition_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_recognition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern recognition result */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recognized pattern */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the pattern recognition */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Trading recommendation based on the recognized pattern */,
  "result_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the pattern recognition result */,
  "result_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the pattern recognition result */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the result (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_recognition_results_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES pattern_recognition ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., algorithm, model) */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "prediction_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for alerts (e.g., which conditions to trigger alerts) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for notifications (e.g., preferred method of notification) */,
  "data_display_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for data display (e.g., preferred charts, indicators) */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the user's dashboard */,
  "preferred_indicators" TEXT /* Preferred technical indicators */,
  "preferred_timeframe" TEXT /* Preferred timeframe for data display */,
  "preferred_charts" TEXT /* Preferred types of charts */,
  "preferred_metrics" TEXT /* Preferred metrics for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
